content: Context loading: load once per session, not per pair. If pair N triggers a write to Octowiki, pair N+1 in the same session doesn't need to re-litigate — they're in the same conversation, context is consistent. Reload on the next session.

provenance.raw_agent: On the context loading question — load once per session, not per pair.
provenance.raw_user: Yes, the shoemakers project was more for reference
